studies.title: Evaluating Positive Care Effects of a Digital Health Application for Obesity Management in a Real-World Setting: A Prospective Observational Cohort Study

_verification.reason: The study explicitly focuses on the app 'Oviva Direkt für Adipositas,' a digital health application (DiGA) for obesity management. The product name is mentioned multiple times in the full text, confirming the study is specifically about this digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RWE indicators vs 1 RCT indicators.
